name: Ganesh Kalal (MIEAust)
tagline: Civil & Structural Engineer | Major Infrastructure Delivery
kicker: Melbourne VIC • Structural Design • QA Compliance • Project Delivery
heroTitle: Delivering major civil, structural, and transport infrastructure with rigorous QA and engineering precision.
heroSubtitle: Civil and Structural Engineer with over 5 years of experience delivering major transport infrastructure, telecom upgrades, and heavy industrial projects across Tier-1 and Tier-2 environments. Specializing in structural design review, subcontractor management, tender evaluation, and stringent QA supervision. Member of Engineers Australia, progressing toward the NER pathway.
signatureLine: Clear sequence. Strong controls. Clean QA. Deliver it right.
aboutLead: A professional portfolio of my engineering experience, presented simply and clearly.
aboutStory: I am a Melbourne-based Civil and Structural Engineer with a proven track record across diverse sectors—from metro rail and freeway upgrades to 5G telecom infrastructure and major industrial works. I focus on structural integrity, meticulous planning, subcontractor coordination, and quality verification to deliver safe, compliant outcomes in complex, high-risk environments.
knownFor: Structural design and analysis for civil, telecom, and infrastructure assets
Technical review and compliance checks to Australian Standards (AS 3600, AS 4100, AS 1170)
Planning and sequencing of heavy civil and structural works
SOW and RFQ preparation, procurement, and tender evaluation
Site inspections, hold points, and rigorous QA conformance reporting

projects.title: Mumbai Metro Line 4 & 5
projects.preview: Civil Site Engineer overseeing QA/QC, elevated viaducts, and underground tunnel (TBM) interfaces.
projects.fullText: Supported independent verification and QA/QC functions during the construction of elevated viaducts, metro stations, and deep foundation works in dense urban environments.
bullets: Supervised concrete QA/QC including slump testing, cube sampling, and dimensional checks for piers and foundations
Conducted pile integrity and dynamic load testing for deep foundation works
Monitored tunnel alignment (TBM), excavation safety, and installation of precast bridge elements
Collaborated with engineers and surveyors to review ITPs and close out non-conformance reports (NCRs)

projects.title: West Gate Freeway Upgrade
projects.preview: Structural design support and construction oversight for RCC crash barriers and precast noise walls.
projects.fullText: Delivered structural design support and site supervision, ensuring works met stringent VicRoads standards and AS 5100 under live-traffic conditions.
bullets: Reviewed shop drawings and supervised concrete pours and panel installations
Conducted QA including concrete testing and reinforcement verification
Delivered civil works to VicRoads standards and AS 5100 requirements
Achieved zero non-conformances across 100+ structural installations

projects.title: National 5G Telecom Upgrade
projects.preview: Led structural design coordination for 150+ tower upgrades and completed 100+ site inspections.
projects.fullText: Delivered design coordination, structural analysis, field inspections, and approvals support for critical telecom infrastructure across multiple council jurisdictions.
bullets: Structural design coordination for 150+ steel and lattice tower upgrades
Completed 100+ site inspections to confirm structural compliance and safety
Technical evaluation of subcontractor engineering proposals
Secured statutory planning approvals from 20+ councils

projects.title: Tier-1 Industrial Closures
projects.preview: Project Engineer overseeing heavy structural dismantling, remediation, and design compliance on major Tier-1 industrial closures.
projects.fullText: Supporting the engineering delivery of Australia's largest industrial closure projects. Managed procurement documentation, structural design package reviews, and complex contractor coordination.
bullets: Reviewed structural design packages for AS 3600 and AS 4100 compliance
Prepared SOW/RFQ packages and evaluated 15+ tender submissions technically
Negotiated and justified contract variations totaling $8M+
Managed contractor coordination and strict quality/safety verification for heavy civil works
Planned sequencing and delivery of heavy civil and structural works on $100M+ industrial projects
Prepared SOW, RFQ, ITPs and managed technical queries, RFIs, and engineering coordination
Produced weekly progress reporting including cost, schedule, and risk; supported statutory approvals
Conducted site inspections, verified hold points, led safety audits, and supported budget variations
Delivered 150+ lattice tower and steel/timber pole upgrades including structural design, analysis, and fabrication coordination
Reviewed drawings and ITPs for AS/NZS 1170.2 and AS 4100 compliance; conducted extensive field inspections
Supported tender evaluation and provided technical input to contract negotiations
Supported statutory approvals across 20+ councils

bullets: Designed reinforced concrete elements to AS 3600 and prepared technical construction drawings
Reviewed subcontractor shop drawings and supervised on-site concrete works including quality testing

Conducted structural asset inspections and prepared rectification recommendations

achievements.text: Maintained an absolute zero LTI record across all high-risk Tier-1 environments.
Negotiated and successfully justified $8M+ in complex contract variations.
Achieved zero non-conformances on 100+ West Gate Freeway structural installations.
Successfully delivered design coordination for 150+ 5G telecom tower upgrades.
Introduced GPS and Drone topographic surveying to improve site remediation accuracy.
